description: The engineering team has finalized the design for the 'Smart Home Hub Pro'. Your task is to configure the manufacturing data and process the first production run in Odoo (admin@example.com / admin, database: odoo_demo). Create a Bill of Materials (BoM) for 'Smart Home Hub Pro' using 1 Circuit Board Assembly, 1 Plastic Housing Unit, 1 Power Supply Module, 1 LED Display Panel, 2 Antenna Modules, and 4 Mounting Brackets. Complete a manufacturing order for 12 units of 'Smart Home Hub Pro' based on this BoM.
